cards.title: Healthcare Fundamentals
cards.content:
• Levels of Healthcare (Primary, Secondary, Tertiary)
• Determinants of Health (Genetics vs. Lifestyle)
• Medical Inflation & Out-of-Pocket Expenses (OOP)

cards.title: 1. Primary Healthcare
cards.content: First point of contact. Common ailments. Examples: PHCs, family doctors, dispensaries.

cards.title: 2. Secondary Healthcare
cards.content: Care by specialists (Cardiologists, Surgeons) in general hospitals. Usually referred by primary care.

cards.title: 3. Tertiary Healthcare
cards.content: Highly specialized. Complex surgeries (Cancer, Organ Transplants). Examples: Super-specialty hospitals like AIIMS.

cards.title: Determinants of Health
cards.content: Genetics, Environment, and Lifestyle. Lifestyle Diseases (Diabetes, Heart Disease) are the biggest modern drivers for insurance.

cards.title: Medical Inflation
cards.content: Medical costs rise much faster than general inflation. Health insurance protects against financial ruin from Out-of-Pocket (OOP) expenses.

sections.title: 🚀 Exam Pro-Tips (Repeated Themes)
items: First point of contact: Primary Healthcare.
Medical Inflation: Rising faster than general inflation.

cards.title: Q2. Which is a Lifestyle Disease?
